branch.branch_summary: Run a runtime-backed v9.1 direction review and open the first External Runtime Production Boundary Candidate implementation task.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v9.0 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Prepare v9.1 External Runtime Production Boundary Candidate: define the exact proof, approval, credential, budget, revocation, rollback, monitoring, incident, and human go/no-go preconditions required before any controlled provider execution is eligible.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: Run a runtime-backed v9.1 direction review and open the first External Runtime Production Boundary Candidate implementation task.
